title: French Nut Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe with French flair.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper. Stir-fry for 5 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add the snow peas and garlic. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and a pinch of salt. Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Slice the French baguette into bite-sized pieces and toast until crispy.
Sprinkle the toasted baguette pieces with sliced almonds and serve with the stir-fry.
